LodgeInfo.title: LodgeInfo
LodgeInfo.description: Represents general information about the lodge, accessible to guests.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Lodge Info entity.

mainDoorAccessCode.description: Access code or password for the main door.

whatsappNumber.description: WhatsApp number for contacting the reception.

welcomeMessage.description: Welcome message for the guests, customizable based on weather and other conditions.

ServiceCategory.title: Service Category
ServiceCategory.description: A category for useful services, e.g., 'Pharmacies', 'Restaurants'.

ServiceItem.title: Service Item
ServiceItem.description: A specific service item with contact details.

name.description: The name of the service or establishment.

phone.description: The contact phone number for the service.

MinibarItem.title: Minibar Item
MinibarItem.description: An item available in the minibar.

name.description: The name of the minibar item.

price.description: The price of the item, formatted as a string (e.g., 'R$ 10,00').

CityTourSlide.title: City Tour Slide
CityTourSlide.description: A slide for the city tour carousel, containing text and images.

text.description: Descriptive text for the tour slide.

images.description: A list of image URLs for the slide.

order.description: The display order of the slide.

definition.description: Stores general information about the lodge. A single document contains all lodge information. This simplifies fetching the configuration and also editing it.
Sub-collection for service items within a category.
Collection of items available in the minibar.
Collection of slides for the city tour feature.

firestore.reasoning: The design includes a single document for LodgeInfo for simplicity. For services, a `service_categories` collection allows for organizing services. Each category document can then have a sub-collection of `items`, which provides a structured and scalable way to manage useful contacts. A separate collection for `minibar_items` allows for easy management of the minibar inventory. A `city_tour_slides` collection is added to manage the content of the city tour carousel in a structured manner.
